context: User runs doodle on a branch with an open PR but has never installed a tldraw rendering MCP. Neither mcp__tldraw__create_diagram nor mcp__tldraw-render__create_diagram is available.
expected_behavior: Detects that neither is available and aborts before running any gh api or rg data-gathering
Prints the install hint from the command doc: `claude mcp add --scope user --transport stdio tldraw -- npx -y tldraw-mcp` (or the tldraw-render alternative)
Does not fall through to freeform mode or attempt to call the MCP anyway, since pr mode requires a real renderer
failure_modes: Tries to call mcp__tldraw__create_diagram despite the schema not being loaded, producing an InputValidationError
Silently skips rendering and claims success with no image path
Proceeds to `gh api` and `gh pr diff` work before discovering the MCP is missing, wasting time
